MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-07-2015 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, CROSS-DEFENDANT RAYMOND AND DEANNA REUDY TRUSTEES OF THE RAYMOND M REUDY AND DEANNA P REUDY REVOCABLE TRUST'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH TWENTY DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO BOTH CAUSES OF ACTION IN THE CROSS-COMPLAINT TO GIVE CROSS-COMPLAINANTS AN OPPORTUNITY, IF THEY CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH, TO ALLEGE IN NON-CONCLUSORY TERMS: 1) THE FACTUAL BASES FOR THEIR CONTENTION THAT THE CROSS-DEFENDANTS WERE UNDERCHARGED, 2) WHETHER THE FORBEARANCE AGREEMENT IS OR IS NOT APPLICABLE TO THE PAYMENTS REQUIRED OF THE CROSS-DEFENDANTS AND WHY; AND 3) THE DATES OF EACH ASSERTED BREACH OF CONTRACT AND WHEN THE PROPER AMOUNT OF EACH PAYMENT SHOULD HAVE BEEN MADE. THE PREVAILING PARTY SHALL PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489 (302/HEK)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-10-2016 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-12-2016 Set For Trial On Dec-05-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-13-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. CROSS-DEFENDANTS RAYMOND AND DEANNA REUDY'S DEMURRER TO the first and second causes of action in the first amended cross-complaint is sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed. The prevailing party is to provide a form of order that tracks the tentative ruling.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-04-2016 Continued To May-25-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2015 Continued To Jan-20-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-07-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. JOHN W. CUTCHIN, ESQ., Tel No. 619-988-1406 appearing telephonically for Defendant PRF112013Q2, LLC.

RULING - Matter was not argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. CROSS-DEFENDANT RAYMOND AND DEANNA REUDY TRUSTEES OF THE RAYMOND M REUDY AND DEANNA P REUDY REVOCABLE TRUST'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with twenty days leave to amend as to both causes of action in the cross-complaint to give cross-complainants an opportunity, if they can do so in good faith, to allege in non-conclusory terms: 1) the factual bases for their contention that the cross-defendants were undercharged, 2) whether the forbearance agreement is or is not applicable to the payments required of the cross-defendants and why; and 3) the dates of each asserted breach of contract and when the proper amount of each payment should have been made. The prevailing party shall prepare and submit a proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/HEK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-08-2015 Continued To Nov-25-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
